_meta.description: Topic-question mappings for the public Vendor Blog Post intake form at /submit/blog. Each topic id maps to a question set the AI uses to assemble a polished blog post. Add new topics by appending to a category's array under `categories`.

topics.title: How to Choose Your Wedding Photographer
topics.description: Help couples understand what to look for beyond just a pretty portfolio. What questions should they ask? What red flags should they watch for?

questions.question: What's the single most important thing a couple should look for in a wedding photographer (besides liking the photos)?

questions.question: What does the contract conversation usually miss? Anything couples should insist on in writing?

questions.question: If a couple is choosing between two photographers and stuck, what tiebreaker do you give them?
